concept_options.title: Your Salad Ate the Air
concept_options.hook: A tree's weight mostly came from invisible gas — not dirt.
concept_options.visual_approach: Split-screen: soil pile shrinking vs CO₂ molecules flowing into a leaf; ends on mass-from-air punchline with animated stat
concept_options.target_audience: Curious adults and students who still think plants eat soil
key_points: Plant dry mass is mostly carbon fixed from atmospheric CO₂
Water and minerals are essential but not the bulk carbon source
Photosynthesis is the gateway process that wires sunlight into that carbon capture
concept_options.core_message: Plants build themselves from air, powered by sunlight.
concept_options.cta: Next time you see a tree, remember: most of its mass rode in as invisible gas.
concept_options.why_this_works: Research shows mass-from-soil is the most persistent documented misconception; short-form rarely targets it with motion graphics.

concept_options.title: Sunlight In, Life Out
concept_options.hook: In 30 seconds: sunlight, water, and CO₂ become the oxygen you breathe.
concept_options.visual_approach: Kinetic equation build: icons for sun, H₂O, CO₂ slide in; animated arrows through a stylized chloroplast; O₂ and glucose pop out with spring motion
concept_options.target_audience: General audience wanting a clean mental model in one watch
key_points: Chlorophyll in chloroplasts captures light energy
Water splits to release O₂; CO₂ is fixed into sugars
concept_options.core_message: Photosynthesis turns light, water, and air into food and oxygen.
concept_options.cta: Every breath you take connects back to a leaf doing this right now.
concept_options.why_this_works: Best fit for exactly 30 seconds: one equation, four inputs/outputs, no time for Calvin-cycle depth.

concept_options.title: Earth's Lungs Just Got Upgraded
concept_options.hook: Scientists recalculated the planet's photosynthesis — it's 31% higher than we thought.
concept_options.visual_approach: Bold stat_card reveal (157 PgC/yr), animated globe with tropical rainforest pulse, quick cut to leaf close-up
concept_options.target_audience: Science-curious viewers who respond to fresh research hooks
key_points: 2024 Nature study raised global gross primary production estimates by ~31%
Tropical rainforests may be more productive carbon sinks than satellite models suggested
Photosynthesis remains the largest carbon flux in Earth's biosphere
concept_options.core_message: We underestimated how hard plants work as planetary carbon engines.
concept_options.cta: Follow for more science that updates what you learned in school.
concept_options.why_this_works: Timely credible hook differentiates from decade-old classroom animations.

concept_options.title: Why Plants Wear Green
concept_options.hook: Plants are green because they throw away the color they don't need.
concept_options.visual_approach: Spectrum bar with red/blue absorbed and green reflected; simple leaf character 'rejecting' green light waves
concept_options.target_audience: Kids and parents; universal 'why is grass green?' question
key_points: Chlorophyll absorbs red and blue light most strongly
Green wavelengths are reflected — that's the color we see
Absorbed light powers the chemistry that builds sugars
concept_options.core_message: Green is the color plants don't use — not the color they love.
concept_options.cta: Look at any leaf differently: you're seeing rejected sunlight.
grounded_in: Why are plants green — common question
concept_options.why_this_works: Single visual metaphor carries a full 30s piece without molecular overload.

selected_concept.rationale: User approved c2: 'Sunlight In, Life Out' maps cleanly to 30 seconds — one kinetic equation, four beats, no Calvin-cycle detour. Strongest match for animated explainer at this duration.

music_source.mood_direction: Light, curious, upbeat educational — soft synth or acoustic; no vocals

voice_selection.rationale: Warm, clear educational delivery; lowest-friction setup with a single OPENAI_API_KEY
voice_selection.delivery_style: Friendly science teacher — crisp, slightly upbeat
voice_selection.pacing_policy: ~75 words in 30s; micro-pauses after equation reveal

stages.approach: ~75-word narration across 4 beats: hook → inputs → process → punchline
4 Remotion scenes: hero_title, text_card (inputs), diagram or comparison (process), stat_card (O₂ out)
TTS narration + mermaid diagram + optional FLUX accents; music from Pixabay search
stages.fallback_if_unavailable: Without API keys: text-only Remotion kinetic typography (no voiceover) using diagram_gen visuals

tools.why_this_provider: Only composition runtime available on this machine
Requires FFmpeg on PATH — currently missing

stages.approach: Remotion templated explainer with flat-motion-graphics playbook tokens
stages.fallback_if_unavailable: BLOCKER: FFmpeg must be installed before final mux — `winget install ffmpeg` or download from ffmpeg.org

quality_tradeoffs.recommendation: Use OpenAI TTS once OPENAI_API_KEY is set — narration is essential for an explainer
quality_tradeoffs.quality_impact: Without TTS the piece becomes a silent kinetic typography clip

quality_tradeoffs.tradeoff: Mermaid diagrams (free) vs FLUX illustrations ($0.12 for 3 images)
quality_tradeoffs.recommendation: Start with mermaid + Remotion motion; add FLUX if you want richer hero visuals
quality_tradeoffs.quality_impact: Diagrams are cleaner for process; FLUX adds warmth and social-stop power

quality_tradeoffs.tradeoff: Templated Remotion scenes vs atelier hand-authored
quality_tradeoffs.recommendation: Templated for this 30s edu piece — fast, reliable, fits duration
quality_tradeoffs.quality_impact: Atelier would cost more iteration for marginal gain at 30 seconds

alternative_paths.description: Minimum viable (after FFmpeg install): mermaid diagrams + Remotion text motion, no API keys, no narration
alternative_paths.what_changes: Silent kinetic typography with on-screen text only

alternative_paths.description: Recommended: OPENAI_API_KEY for TTS + mermaid + Remotion + Pixabay music
alternative_paths.what_changes: Full narrated explainer with diagram visuals

alternative_paths.description: Premium: OPENAI_API_KEY + FAL_KEY (FLUX images) + ElevenLabs-quality optional upgrade
alternative_paths.what_changes: Custom illustrated leaf/chloroplast scenes plus narration

line_items.notes: Remotion available; FFmpeg required for audio mux

savings_options: Skip FLUX images — use free mermaid diagrams only
Use Piper local TTS (free) instead of OpenAI if you install piper-tts

approval.user_notes: User approved concept c2 and recommended production plan (OpenAI TTS + mermaid + Remotion + Pixabay).

decisions.subject: Production pipeline

options_considered.label: animation
options_considered.reason: Possible but optimized for longer motion-graphics pieces

options_considered.label: cinematic
options_considered.reason: Wrong grammar for a science explainer

decisions.reason: User requested a 30-second animated explainer about photosynthesis — matches generated explainer pipeline.

decisions.subject: Composition render runtime

options_considered.label: Remotion (React scene stack)
options_considered.reason: Available on machine — text_card, stat_card, hero_title, diagram overlays, word-level captions

options_considered.label: HyperFrames (HTML/CSS/GSAP)
options_considered.reason: Rejected — FFmpeg not on PATH; hyperframes doctor would fail

options_considered.label: FFmpeg-only concat
options_considered.reason: Rejected — ffmpeg binary not on PATH; insufficient for animated explainer grammar

decisions.reason: Only Remotion is available. Recommended for this brief: existing React scene types (text_card, hero_title, stat_card) fit equation-led 30s edu motion. HyperFrames unavailable until FFmpeg is installed.

decisions.subject: Composition authoring mode

options_considered.label: Atelier (hand-authored)
options_considered.reason: Higher craft but overkill for 30s standard edu brief

decisions.reason: 30-second educational equation walkthrough fits templated Remotion scenes; atelier reserved for hero/brand work.

decisions.subject: Visual style playbook

options_considered.label: flat-motion-graphics
options_considered.reason: Bold icons, fast pace, social-native — pipeline recommended

decisions.reason: Energetic motion graphics with purple/teal palette fits photosynthesis inputs/outputs animation.

options_considered.label: ElevenLabs / Suno generation
options_considered.reason: No music generation API keys configured
